_archetypes.name: GW Kithkin
_archetypes.short: Go-wide aggro/midrange. Kithkin tribal with anthems, convoke, and one big attacker per turn.
_archetypes.strategy: Curve out with Kithkin creatures and leverage Thoughtweft Lieutenant to keep them above rate. Attack with one huge buffed creature while stonewalling with the rest. Mistmeadow Council is absurd when mostly Kithkin.

_archetypes.name: WU Merfolk
_archetypes.short: Tempo/tap synergies. Merfolk tap for value, convoke spells, and fly over for damage.
_archetypes.strategy: Draft Merfolk that care about being tapped. Use convoke to tap creatures for value without risking combat. Wanderbrine Trapper locks down threats while triggering tap abilities. Flying keeps pressure on.

_archetypes.name: BR Goblins
_archetypes.short: Blight aristocrats. Weaponize -1/-1 counters and goblin deaths for damage and value.
_archetypes.strategy: Flood the board with Goblin tokens, stack Blight counters where they don't matter, and sacrifice recklessly. Boggart Cursecrafter pings on each goblin death. Boggart Mischief and Retched Wretch are key engines.

_archetypes.name: UR Elementals
_archetypes.short: Big spells & ETB doublers. Cast MV 4+ spells to trigger Elementals. Panharmonicon with Twinflame Travelers.
_archetypes.strategy: Draft Elementals with strong ETB triggers. Twinflame Travelers doubles them. Prioritize MV 4+ cards. Flamebraider ramps into big Elementals. Often splashes for vivid payoffs.

_archetypes.name: BG Elves
_archetypes.short: Graveyard grind. Elves die, return, and die again — each time generating value through recursion and tokens.
_archetypes.strategy: Best archetype in the format. Fill your graveyard with Elves via self-mill and trades, then recur them for massive value. Morcant's Loyalist buffs and replaces. Play minimum 9 Elves/Changelings to enable Behold.

_archetypes.name: UB Faeries
_archetypes.short: Flash/instant control. Cast spells on opponent's turn to trigger Faerie payoffs.
_archetypes.strategy: Draft Voracious Tome-Skimmer highly — you need 3+ copies. Fill deck with flash creatures and instants. Unwelcome Sprite and Nightmare Sower provide redundancy. Control the game at instant speed.

_archetypes.name: UG Vivid
_archetypes.short: 5-color good stuff. Control permanents of different colors for Vivid bonuses. Ramp into bombs.
_archetypes.strategy: Draft fixing (Changeling Wayfinder is key) and powerful vivid payoffs. Often splashes 3+ colors. Aurora Awakener may be the best card in the set. Prismabasher, Glister Bairn, Wildvine Pummeler are top-end threats.

_archetypes.name: WB Blight
_archetypes.short: -1/-1 counter synergies. Place counters to fuel abilities, draw cards, and reanimate.
_archetypes.strategy: Use Blight as a resource. Moonlit Lamenter converts -1/-1 counters into card draw. Reaping Willow reanimates creatures. Blighted Blackthorn pairs well with both. Grindy midrange/control plan.

_archetypes.name: RW Blight
_archetypes.short: Aggressive blight. Place -1/-1 counters to fuel efficient spells and pump effects.
_archetypes.strategy: Use Blight aggressively — Cinder Strike becomes 1-mana deal 4. Combine with white's removal and efficient creatures. More aggressive than WB, using counters to enable cheap, powerful effects.

_archetypes.name: RG Vivid
_archetypes.short: Ramp into big vivid threats. Giants and Elementals overlap. Often 3+ colors with UG.
_archetypes.strategy: Overlaps heavily with UG Vivid. Ramp with green fixing into expensive multicolor threats. Boldwyr Aggressor gives giants double strike. Usually played as Temur (URG).

_tips.title: Mana Curve
_tips.body:
1-drops: 1-2
2-drops: 4-5
3-drops: 3-5
4-drops: 3-4
5+: 2-3
Total: 15-17 creatures, 6-8 spells, 17 lands (or 16 with fixing)

_tips.title: Key Mechanics
_tips.body: Kithkin/Merfolk/Goblins/Elves/Faeries — 5 typal archetypes with tribal payoffs Vivid Lands — enable 3+ color 'good stuff' decks (UG/RG Vivid) -1/-1 Counters — WB/RW use Blight mechanic to shrink + remove threats Evoke — pay alternate cost for immediate ETB effect Champion — exile your creature, get it back when champion leaves

_tips.title: Format Speed
_tips.body:
Medium-fast format. Aggro (RW Blight, BR Goblins) can close games quickly.
UB Faeries and UG Vivid play longer games. Respect early pressure — don't stumble on mana.

_tips.title: Draft Priorities
_tips.body: P1P1: Bombs > Premium removal (Soul Immolation) > Best uncommon signpost Pack 1: Stay open, take best card. Tribal payoffs wheel if open. Pack 2: Commit to archetype, prioritize tribal synergy + removal Pack 3: Fill curve gaps, grab tribal role-players, last removal

Ashling's Command.comment: Among the most broken rares. Premium for UR Elementals.

Ashling, Rekindled.comment: Mana ramp and late-game threat rolled into one.

Assert Perfection.comment: Green's only removal. Slightly better Rabid Bite.

Aurora Awakener.comment: Possibly the best card in the set. Reason to draft UG Vivid.

Bark of Doran.comment: Awesome with Gravelgill Scoundrel and Tributary Vaulter. Usually tables.

Bitterbloom Bearer.comment: Premium card. High win rate per 17lands data.

Bitterblossom.comment: Turn 2 Bitterblossom is the best start in the format. Insane with tribal.

Blighted Blackthorn.comment: High toughness absorbs -1/-1 counters. Top common for blight decks.

Bloodline Bidding.comment: Mass recursion. Often ends the game immediately in Elves.

Blossombind.comment: 2-mana Claustrophobia that prevents untapping. Best version of the effect.

Boggart Cursecrafter.comment: SIGNAL: Go BR Goblins. Pings opponent every time a Goblin dies.

Boggart Mischief.comment: Kill a Goblin, make two, drain opponent. Does everything Goblins wants.

Boggart Prankster.comment: Solid 2-drop. Attacks as 2/3 early, absorbs -1/-1 counters late.

Bogslither's Embrace.comment: 2 mana + blight for efficient removal. Top black common.

Boldwyr Aggressor.comment: Double strike for Giants. Only Giant typal card. Needs Changelings.

Boulder Dash.comment: Arc Trail reprint. Split 3 damage for a two-for-one. Creatures are small in ECL.

Brigid's Command.comment: Strong command. Doesn't require Kithkin to be good.

Brigid, Clachan's Heart.comment: Strong rare. Doesn't require Kithkin to be good.

Champion of the Clachan.comment: Strong Kithkin payoff. Rewards heavy tribal commitment.

Champions of the Shoal.comment: 4-mana Frost Titan for Merfolk. 6 toughness dodges most removal.

Changeling Wayfinder.comment: Most important common in ECL. Mana fixing at premium. Every creature type.

Cinder Strike.comment: 1 mana for 4 damage with blight cost. Extremely efficient in blight decks.

Clachan Festival.comment: Strong card that doesn't require Kithkin to be good.

Crossroads Watcher.comment: Trample finisher for wide boards. Ranked highly on pick order.

Dawn's Light Archer.comment: Top green common. Solid in Elves.

Dawnhand Dissident.comment: Plays from graveyard. Pairs with Blight strategies.

Deceit.comment: Incarnation mythic. Extremely promising in Limited.

Deepchannel Duelist.comment: SIGNAL: Go WU Merfolk. Buffs Merfolk, untaps creatures, only 2 mana.

Disruptor of Currents.comment: Convoke on opponent's turn for a discount. Great utility + stats.

Doran, Besieged by Time.comment: Effectively a 5/9. Build around high-toughness creatures. Worth splashing.

Dundoolin Weaver.comment: 2-mana Eternal Witness with setup. Great in Kithkin or Elves.

Eclipsed Boggart.comment: SIGNAL: Go BR Goblins. Premium Eclipsed creature.

Eclipsed Elf.comment: SIGNAL: Go BG Elves. Best Eclipsed creature. Only playable in Elves.

Eclipsed Flamekin.comment: Smooths draws and buys time for Elementals.

Eclipsed Kithkin.comment: SIGNAL: Go GW Kithkin. Premium Eclipsed creature for the archetype.

Eclipsed Merrow.comment: SIGNAL: Go WU Merfolk. Digs for lands/fuel in creature-heavy Merfolk.

Elder Auntie.comment: Provides 2 bodies for Goblin sacrifice. Only good in heavy Goblins.

Evershrike's Gift.comment: Gives flying. Helps giants/big creatures get through.

Explosive Prodigy.comment: 2-mana 1/1 that deals 2 on entry. Every red drafter takes highly.

Figure of Fable.comment: Grows fast, threatens to end the game. Any G or W deck wants this.

Flame-Chain Mauler.comment: Solid 2-drop. Good activated ability in a format lacking mana sinks.

Flamebraider.comment: Best mana creature for Elementals. 2 mana of any color towards Elementals.

Flamekin Gildweaver.comment: Makes treasures. Doubled by Twinflame Travelers.

Flock Impostor.comment: Hold open 3 mana for saves, combat tricks, or retrigger ETBs.

Gallant Fowlknight.comment: Solid curve filler in Kithkin. Best in GW.

Giantfall.comment: Instant-speed bite spell. Red has big creatures to back it up.

Glamermite.comment: Crafty plays in Merfolk. Enables tap synergies.

Gloom Ripper.comment: Bomb-level payoff in Elves. Demands heavy Elf count.

Gnarlbark Elm.comment: Green removal. Excels in toughness-matters with extra -1/-1 counters.

Goldmeadow Nomad.comment: One-mana Kithkin that's two bodies. Divisive — great in aggro, weak elsewhere.

Gravelgill Scoundrel.comment: Gets value even on stalled boards. Built-in evasion.

Graveshifter.comment: Gravedigger upgrade. 4 mana 2/2 + recursion. Every creature type. Any black deck wants this.

Great Forest Druid.comment: Pairs with Soul Immolation. Solid green body.

Grub's Command.comment: 63.7% IHW. No weak modes. Best card in Goblins by far.

High Perfect Morcant.comment: Elf lord bomb. Tremendous payoff for heavy Elf count.

Illusion Spinners.comment: Works with changeling type matters cards.

Kinbinding.comment: Miserable to face. Liminal Hold is the best answer.

Kulrath Mystic.comment: Grows from Twinflame Travelers triggers. 4/4 base.

Liminal Hold.comment: 4-mana Banishing Light + 2 life. Premium universal answer.

Meanders Guide.comment: Repeated bounce when you safely tap Merfolk.

Mirrorform.comment: Build-around. Pair with token generators like Elder Auntie.

Mistmeadow Council.comment: Absurd when mostly Kithkin. Play any number of copies.

Moon-Vigil Adherents.comment: Top green card. Good in any green deck, especially Kithkin.

Moonlit Lamenter.comment: 2/5 that converts -1/-1 counters into cards. Fragile to removal.

Morcant's Eyes.comment: Premium Elf payoff. Relies on heavy Elf count.

Morcant's Loyalist.comment: SIGNAL: Go BG Elves. Buffs Elves and returns one on death.

Mudbutton Cursetosser.comment: Worthy runner-up among best uncommon Big Five payoffs.

Nameless Inversion.comment: Best black common. 2 mana -3/-3. Every creature type — insane tribal synergy.

Nightmare Sower.comment: Flash payoff. Lifelink + -1/-1 counters. Makes racing impossible.

Oko, Lorwyn Liege.comment: Puts 6 power into play on turn 4 with constant self-mill/draw.

Prismabasher.comment: Big vivid threat. Costs substantial mana.

Pummeler for Hire.comment: Solid green body. Often better than narrow tribal cards.

Reaping Willow.comment: 3/6 lifelinker that reanimates. Key WB payoff. Hybrid so contested.

Retched Wretch.comment: Comes back immediately. Perfect blight host for any deck using -1/-1 counters.

Rimekin Recluse.comment: Man-o'-War variant. Contender for best nonrare in ECL.

Sear.comment: 2 mana 4 damage instant. Premium red common removal.

Shinestriker.comment: Premium Elemental/Vivid payoff. Expensive but worth it.

Silvergill Mentor.comment: 2-mana Silvergill Adept variant. Creates 1/1 token instead of drawing.

Silvergill Peddler.comment: Cares about being tapped. Great with convoke.

Sizzling Changeling.comment: Changeling for any tribal deck. Decent red body.

Soul Immolation.comment: Red Plague Wind with high-toughness enablers. Pair with Blighted Blackthorn.

Soulbright Seeker.comment: Aggressive Elemental. Gives trample. Not worth playing in most UR decks.

Spinerock Tyrant.comment: Monster bomb. 6/6 dragon with wither + removal doubling.

Summit Sentinel.comment: Preferred over Flame-Chain Mauler in Elementals.

Sun-Dappled Celebrant.comment: Big convoke creature. Merfolk love being tapped for this.

Sygg's Command.comment: Strong Merfolk command with flexible modes.

Tend the Sprigs.comment: Works with changeling type matters cards.

Thoughtweft Imbuer.comment: Most aggressively-taken uncommon in ECL. Swings most games.

Thoughtweft Lieutenant.comment: SIGNAL: Go GW Kithkin. Keeps all creatures permanently above rate.

Tributary Vaulter.comment: Tap payoff. Uses convoke spells to great effect.

Trystan's Command.comment: Best command. Murder + Overrun or Murder + Restock. Wins games outright.

Twilight Diviner.comment: Copies spells cast from graveyard. Massive value swings in Elves.

Twinflame Travelers.comment: SIGNAL: Go UR Elementals. Panharmonicon for Elemental triggers.

Unwelcome Sprite.comment: 2-mana 2/1 flyer. Mild redundancy for Tome-Skimmer. Underwhelming alone.

Voracious Tome-Skimmer.comment: SIGNAL: Go UB Faeries. Need 3+ copies. Only strong payoff for the archetype.

Wanderbrine Preacher.comment: Listed among top white commons alongside Liminal Hold.

Wanderbrine Trapper.comment: Best tapper since Gideon's Lawkeeper. 1-mana 2/1 that locks down threats.

Wistfulness.comment: 6/5 that sometimes kills Liminal Hold and Blossombind.
